title: Warden of the Assembly Core
description: Dungeon boss at the heart of the Assembly. A Warden variant built from salvaged line parts. Tests load limits by being one.

steps.text: The core chamber was not built. It was accumulated. Forty years of salvaged line parts, stacked and bolted until they remembered how to stand. In the center, a figure that had once been several figures waited with the patience of stockpiled inventory.

lines.speaker: Warden of the Assembly Core
lines.text: You are off-manifest. I will require a variance form.

lines.speaker: Warden of the Assembly Core
lines.text: Then we will fill one out together. The form has fourteen sections. The last section is combat.

lines.speaker: Chem Tech
lines.text: What's in the other thirteen sections?

lines.speaker: Warden of the Assembly Core
lines.text: Also combat. The paperwork and the process are the same thing here.
